messages.content:
# CALIFORNIA COMMERCIAL LEASE AGREEMENT

This Lease Agreement made the **2025-03-22**, by and between **Felipe Jones** [name of lessor], of **2782 Vicarage Close** [street address], State of **California**, hereinafter referred to as "Lessor", and **Kassulke - O'Conner** [name of lessee], of **47632 Cassin Expressway** [street address], State of **California**, hereinafter referred to as "Lessee", collectively referred to herein as the "Parties", agree as follows:

## 1. DESCRIPTION OF LEASED PREMISES:

The Lessor agrees to lease to the Lessee the following described **4947** square feet (SF) of **Warehouse** located at **99096 W 8th Street** [street address], State of California.

## 2. TERM OF LEASE:

The term of this Lease shall be for a period of **4** year(s) **4** month(s) commencing on the **22** day of **March 2025**, and expiring at Midnight on the **22** day of **July 2029**. ("Initial Term")

## 3. BASE RENT:

The net monthly payment shall be **3449** dollars ($3449) per month. A security deposit of **8475** dollars ($8475) is required, payable monthly with the first payment due upon the commencement of the Lease and each monthly installment payable thereafter on the 1st day of each month.

## 4. Options to Renew (Check one):

☑ Lessee may not renew the Lease.  
☑ The Lessee may have the right to renew the Lease with a total of ____ renewal period(s) with each term being ____ year(s) ____ month(s) which may be exercised by giving written notice to Lessor no less than 60 days prior to the expiration of the Lease or renewal period.

---

Prepared using zipForm® software

<page_number>Page 5 of 8</page_number>
